comment.text: Make scheduled HN ingestion testable and runnable outside the Fly cron endpoint. In lib/hn/scheduler.ts, introduce an exported ScheduledIngestDeps interface with findHiringThreads(count?: number): Promise<HiringThread[]>, findNewestStoredThread(): Promise<{ hnId: string; month: string; postedAt: Date; lastIngestedAt: Date | null } | null>, and ingestThread(thread: HiringThread): Promise<IngestResult>. Keep runScheduledIngest(now?: Date) working with real Prisma/HN defaults, but also allow runScheduledIngest(now, deps) so tests can inject fakes without network or DB access. Add export function startIngestSchedule(deps: ScheduledIngestDeps, intervalMs: number, timers?: { setInterval: typeof setInterval; clearInterval: typeof clearInterval }): () => void. It should run one ingest immediately, continue every intervalMs, and return a stop function that clears the interval. Preserve the existing adaptive skip/ingest behavior.
